summary: Tested ArtJoga backend booking APIs and frontend landing page end-to-end. All 6 pytest backend tests pass and all 9 frontend flows from the review request verified successfully (hero/slogan, section counts, RU/EN switch, nav scroll, FAQ accordion, header book button, booking form submission with toast + reset + persistence, mobile menu toggle). No bugs found.
critical_code_review_comments: Resend email send is skipped because RESEND_API_KEY / STUDIO_EMAIL are intentionally empty in /app/backend/.env (per problem statement). email_sent:false in responses is expected, not a bug.

send_booking_email is invoked BEFORE persisting the booking; if email fails after some external attempt the booking still saves (correct), but consider awaiting persistence first and emailing asynchronously to decouple latency.

GET /api/bookings is currently public/unauthenticated and returns up to 1000 records including names, phones and emails - this is a privacy/PII risk if the app is shipped to production. Recommend adding auth or admin-only protection before launch.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 TEST_-prefixed bookings in MongoDB via pytest + 1 TEST_Playwright booking via UI submission. Not cleaned up; recommend cleanup or filter on TEST_ prefix.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend POST /api/bookings + GET /api/bookings, email validation (422), and persistence are confirmed. Frontend Lenis smooth scroll works with scrollIntoView. All data-testid kebab-case selectors (lang-ru/en, nav-*, mobile-nav-*, faq-item-*, why-card-*, benefit-item-*, gallery-image-*, review-card-*, booking-*, header-book-button, mobile-menu-toggle) are wired correctly. Toast on submit is sonner [data-sonner-toast].
